title: Mustardy Miniature French Panang-Paste Individual Mini Gratin
description: A crispy, light French dish from Normandy featuring panang-paste, suitable for a quick vegan-friendly lunch or dinner. Perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: In a small saucepan, melt 1 tablespoon of vegan butter over low heat.
Add the panang paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
In a blender or food processor, combine the flour, plant-based milk, nutritional yeast, and a pinch of salt. Blend until smooth.
Pour the blended mixture into a saucepan and cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture thickens.
Add the saucepan mixture to the saucepan with the panang paste and stir to combine.
Pour the mixture into 4-6 individual mini cocottes or ramekins.
Add 1-2 tablespoons of vegan butter on top of each cocotte.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the gratin is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
